reasoning: 1. TP Dist: 2690.1 (Targeting VAL support). 2. SL Dist: 1059.9 (Base 1.8x + 0.3x Squeeze Offset). 3. TP/SL Ratio: 2.54. 4. Regime: SQUEEZE/BEARISH. 5. Logic: Following the Red Team critique, the teal triangle is identified as a bearish continuation (bear flag) within a macro downtrend of lower highs. The overhead HVN (67500-68000) acts as a supply ceiling, while a liquidity void exists below 66000. A breakdown is expected to flush price toward the VAL at 64500. The POC at 68940 is confirmed as resistance rather than a magnet.
reasoning_zh: 1. 止盈距离: 2690.1 (目标位 VAL 支撑)。2. 止损距离: 1059.9 (基础 1.8x + 0.3x 挤压偏移)。3. 盈亏比: 2.54。4. 市场格局: 波动率挤压/看跌。5. 逻辑: 根据红队审查，15分钟图上的青色三角形被识别为宏观下降趋势（1小时图低点降低）中的看跌旗形。上方 67500-68000 的高成交量节点（HVN）构成了供应天花板，而 66000 下方存在流动性真空。预计价格跌破三角形后将迅速下探至 64500 附近的价值区间低沿（VAL）。POC (68940) 已被确认为阻力位而非吸引位。
